languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

languages.text: "Сделка состоялась. Я заберу свое с твоего корабля, когда придет время".
"The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."
languages.original_text: "Сделка состоялась. Я заберу свое с твоего корабля, когда придет время".

traits.locale_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."
"The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."
"The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

languages.text: «El trato está sellado. Obtendré mi nueva adquisición en tu nave cuando llegue el momento».
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: «El trato está sellado. Obtendré mi nueva adquisición en tu nave cuando llegue el momento».

languages.text: “一言为定。等时机到了，我会去你的舰船取走我的新藏品。”
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: “一言为定。等时机到了，我会去你的舰船取走我的新藏品。”

languages.text: « Marché conclu. Je prendrai possession de mon nouveau bien une fois le moment venu. »
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: « Marché conclu. Je prendrai possession de mon nouveau bien une fois le moment venu. »

languages.text: "Anlaşmaya vardık. Zamanı geldiğinde yeni kazanımımı geminden alacağım."
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Anlaşmaya vardık. Zamanı geldiğinde yeni kazanımımı geminden alacağım."

languages.text: "Dann sind wir uns einig. Ich werde meine Neuerwerbung zu gegebener Zeit auf deinem Schiff abholen."
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Dann sind wir uns einig. Ich werde meine Neuerwerbung zu gegebener Zeit auf deinem Schiff abholen."

languages.text: 「取引は完了だ。時が来たら、私の新兵器を君の船から回収する。」
languages.original_text: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: 「取引は完了だ。時が来たら、私の新兵器を君の船から回収する。」
